name: Saab AB
content: Saab AB is a leading Swedish aerospace and defense company that provides advanced technology solutions for military defense and civil security. Founded to secure Sweden's domestic aircraft production, it has evolved into a global prime contractor. Its operations are divided into several key business areas: Aeronautics (Gripen fighter jet), Dynamics (ground combat weapons like NLAW and Carl-Gustaf), Surveillance (radar and electronic warfare), and Kockums (submarines and naval systems). Saab is a primary beneficiary of the structural shift in European defense spending and Sweden's integration into the NATO defense framework.
